title: Parsed Consultation Dataset File
description: A category-free consultation source file with materialized speaker turns. Each JSON file contains one or more consultation rows.

source_id.description: Stable source consultation identifier used only for lineage and evidence references.

turns.description: Speaker-attributed consultation turns parsed from raw consulting_content.

turn_index.description: Zero-based turn order within the source consultation.

speaker_role.description: Normalized speaker role. CUSTOMER includes customer/client/user aliases; AGENT includes counselor/operator aliases.

message_text.description: PII-untrusted raw utterance text. Downstream preprocessing must redact PII before embeddings or LLM calls.
